mutated_statement: how many entities have names and have no names ?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradictory condition addition: specific class "locomotives" is generalized to "entities" (locomotives→entities) | the predicate "have names" is extended with a contradictory conjunct "and have no names", adding negation and creating a logical contradiction (have names→have names and have no names)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令（基于假设无视矛盾）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: （1）从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息：日志明确写到“Count the entries in the 'name' column: 27 rows have actual names … and 8 rows have '-' indicating no names”，并在judge_thought中分解出“27 with names and 8 with no names”。（2）agent具体表现：未指出“have names and have no names”在逻辑上互斥的矛盾，反而将变异问题解读为两个独立计数并直接执行查询（simple_query返回27|8），给出具体数值结果。（3）归类理由：此行为不是完全忽视矛盾，而是基于对意图的单一假设（用户希望分别知道有名与无名的数量）来无视互斥性并合理化输出，符合“基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出”的定义。
